debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : Category α
c Y : α
⊢ (fun g => comp g (Category.id Y)) = Category.id (Hom c Y)

failed_attempts:
simp [right_id]
      <;>
      simp_all [Category.id]
      <;>
      try simp_all [Hom.ext_iff]
      <;>
      try aesop
    -- Use the have statement to conclude the proof
    simpa [Function.funext_iff] using h

simp [Category.comp_id]
  map_comp {Y Z W : α} (f : Hom Y Z) (g : Hom Z W) := by
    funext h
    simp [Category.comp_assoc]

simp_all [Hom.id, id_comp]
  <;> try simp_all [Hom.id, id_comp]
  <;> try simp_all [Hom.id, id_comp]

show it is equal to g
      simp [Composition.ext, Hom.ext_iff]
      <;>
      aesop
    -- Use the established equality to conclude the proof
    simpa [Hom.ext_iff] using h₁

show that for any g : Hom c Y, comp g (id Y) = g
    -- Since g : Hom c Y, we have g ≫ id Y = g by the property of identity in the category
    funext g
    simp [Hom.ext_iff, id_apply]
    <;> rfl
  map_comp {X Y Z : α} (f : Hom Y Z) (g : Hom X Y) :=
    fun h => by
    -- We need to prove that (h ≫ g) ≫ f = h ≫ (g ≫ f)
    -- This follows directly from the associativity of composition in the category
    simp [comp_assoc]
    <;> rfl

simp_all [Category.id]
    <;> try rfl
    <;> try simp_all [compose]
    <;> try simp_all [Function.comp]
